title: Assessment Output
description: Output format for a completed or in-progress assessment. Contains metadata and answers. Non-repeatable answers are keyed by task ID (e.g. '2.1.3'). Repeatable answers are grouped under the parent task ID as arrays with _index per element.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema that describes this output format

metadata.description: Output metadata including URN identifier of the assessment definition

urn.description: URN identifier of the assessment definition. Official versions are stamped coarse MAJOR.MINOR (e.g. 'urn:nl:dpia:3.0'); concept versions keep their full prerelease identifier (e.g. 'urn:nl:dpia:3.1.0-concept.2').

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this output was created

createdBy.description: User who created this export (optional, for audit exports)

completedTasks.description: IDs of tasks marked as completed by the user (e.g. ['0', '1', '3']). Only present when at least one task is completed.

answers.description: User answers keyed by task ID. Non-repeatable: direct answer object (e.g. '0.1'). Repeatable: array of indexed group elements under the parent task ID (e.g. '2.1').

oneOf.description: Grouped answers for a repeatable parent task. Each element represents one repetition with its index and child answers.

answerKey.description: Answer key: a task ID for non-repeatable answers (e.g. '0.1', '2.1.3') or a parent task ID for grouped repeatable answers (e.g. '2.1').

answer.description: A single answer value with metadata

value.description: The answer value. Type depends on the field: string for text/date/radio/image-url, string[] for checkboxes, imageValue for uploaded images, null for cleared answers.

lastEditedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this answer was last modified

lastEditedBy.description: Display name of the user who last edited this answer (optional, for audit exports)

imageValue.description: An uploaded image with optional metadata

data.description: Base64 data URI of the embedded image

title.description: Image title / caption, also used as alt text

source.description: Source attribution (URL, document reference, or free text)

indexedGroupElement.description: A single repetition within a grouped repeatable answer. Contains _index and child task answers.
